utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section appears to be fully detailed: (1) property includes type, location, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, condition, availability, taxes, and move-in date; (2) financing includes down payment, mortgage, interest, term, and associated costs; (3) legal_services has provider, cost, and duration; (4) moving_services has provider, cost, and service inclusions; (5) setup_services lists package type, included utilities, setup cost, and timeline; (6) total_budget includes total estimated cost and currency. All items are present and complete according to expectations.
